body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule S 2025 amount transferred by a child 18 or over enrolled in post-secondary studies.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.S-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule S numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 6012
Value: 7646
Value: 7.14
Value: 501

Schedule S applies if the student was born before January 1, 2008, was a full-time student in 2025 pursuing eligible vocational or post-secondary studies, and received an RL-8 slip with an amount in box A. The schedule says that if the student did not receive an RL-8 slip, the student does not complete Schedule S, and only the student encloses the schedule with the return.

Part A calculates the amount that can be transferred. Line 2 is $6,012. Line 4 is the amount for post-secondary studies from RL-8 box A, subject to a maximum of $7,646. Line 6 adds lines 2 and 4, but says to enter zero if the student did not receive an RL-8 slip or received an RL-8 slip with no amount in box A. Line 8 is the reduction if the student turned 18 in 2025 from the work chart. Line 9 is the amount from TP-1 line 358. Line 10 multiplies the solidarity tax credit received in 2025 by 7.14. Line 11 adds lines 8 through 10. Line 12 subtracts line 11 from line 6 and floors the result at zero. Line 14 is the amount from TP-1 line 299. Line 16 subtracts line 14 from line 12 and floors the result at zero; this is the amount that can be transferred.

Part B records the individuals to whom the student transfers an amount. Lines 20.1 and 20.2 are the amounts transferred to the first and second individual. The student can transfer all or part of line 16. Parents do not enclose Schedule S, but must complete Part B of Schedule A and enter the transferred amount on line 28 of that schedule. The work chart for line 8 gives $501 on line 25 and multiplies it by the number of months in the year that precede the student's birthday, including the month of the birthday, on line 26. The result is carried to line 8 as the amount of the reduction.
